scripts.github:sync: bun run github:sync:staging && bun run github:sync:prod
scripts.github:sync:config: bun run github:sync:config:staging && bun run github:sync:config:prod
scripts.github:sync:config:prod: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=prod -v GITHUB_SYNC_SCOPE=secrets -v GITHUB_SYNC_PUSH_SECRETS=false -- bun packages/alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts deploy admin stacks/admin.ts
scripts.github:sync:config:staging: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=staging -v GITHUB_SYNC_SCOPE=secrets -v GITHUB_SYNC_PUSH_SECRETS=false -- bun packages/alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts deploy admin stacks/admin.ts
scripts.github:sync:prod: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=prod -v GITHUB_SYNC_SCOPE=secrets -e .env.production -- bun packages/alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts deploy admin stacks/admin.ts
scripts.github:sync:staging: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=staging -v GITHUB_SYNC_SCOPE=secrets -e .env.staging -- bun packages/alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts deploy admin stacks/admin.ts
scripts.github:env: bun run github:env:staging && bun run github:env:prod
scripts.github:env:prod: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=prod -v GITHUB_SYNC_SCOPE=environment -e .env.production -- bun packages/alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts deploy admin stacks/admin.ts
scripts.github:env:staging: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=staging -v GITHUB_SYNC_SCOPE=environment -e .env.staging -- bun packages/alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts deploy admin stacks/admin.ts
